comments.author: RebarBotNava
comments.body: Root-caused via joe-debug. Confirmed mechanism deterministically: pass1.py:319/504 passed ctx.repo_root (code snapshot, no .tickets-tracker) as the ticket-store root -> 'cannot list' + silently dropped ISF/recall context. Fix: PlanContext.tickets_root captured from current_tickets_root() at assemble time (thread-safe for the pass1 worker-thread fan-out); both reads routed through it. RED->GREEN test tests/unit/test_attested_ticket_root.py (mutation-checked). Subagent audit confirms exactly 2 sites in the class; workflow-path reads use StepContext.repo_root (ticket root by design) - OK. Live attested review-plan replication: 0 'cannot list'. Committed 278fedf32 (Change-Id I43ac31f). Pending: push to gerrit + CI green before close.

compiled_state.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. Run an attested-mode LLM gate from any checkout, e.g. `rebar review-plan <id>` (default source=attested).
2. Observe `Error: cannot list '<code-snapshot>/.tickets-tracker'` on stderr; the linked-session-log ISF context + prior REVIEW_RESULT recall are silently dropped.

## Root cause
In attested mode the ticket store is materialized SEPARATELY (`current_tickets_root()` / `cfg.tickets_path`) because it lives on the orphan `tickets` branch, absent from the code snapshot. `plan_review/pass1.py` passed `ctx.repo_root` (the CODE snapshot) as `repo_root` for TICKET reads: `_reads.show_ticket(tgt, repo_root=ctx.repo_root)` (line 319) and `sidecar.prior_concerns(..., repo_root=ctx.repo_root)` (line 504). `tracker_dir(<code-snapshot>)` = `<code-snapshot>/.tickets-tracker` which doesn't exist -> `_scan_alias` prints 'cannot list' and the reads degrade. PlanContext had no ticket-root field, so pass1 reused the code root.

## Fix
Add `tickets_root` to `PlanContext`, populated from `current_tickets_root()` at assemble time (assembling thread -> survives the pass1 worker-thread fan-out a ContextVar would not be inherited by); route the two reads through `ctx.tickets_root` (None -> live checkout store).

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: attested ticket reads resolve against the pinned tickets snapshot; no spurious errors; ISF + recall preserved.
- Actual: reads target the code snapshot -> 'cannot list' + silently dropped context.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `PlanContext` carries `tickets_root` from `current_tickets_root()` at assemble time.
- [ ] `pass1.py` session-log + prior-concerns reads use `ctx.tickets_root`, not `ctx.repo_root`.
- [ ] Regression test asserts both reads target the tickets root (mutation-checked RED->GREEN).
- [ ] make lint && make typecheck && make test green.
compiled_state.title: Attested LLM gate reads the ticket store from the code snapshot (silent context loss + 'cannot list' noise)
